# closeup photo of castle with mist

We went to Germany for one day to explore some spots. The first stop was Burg Eltz during sunrise. With no tourists there yet and this amazing fog covering the castle it was like a fairytale.

Read more

A map markerEltz Castle, Wierschem, Germany

Calendar outlinedPublished on December 29, 2017CameraNIKON CORPORATION, NIKON D750SafetyFree to use under the [Unsplash License](https://unsplash.com/license)
